description: Benchmark on 60 real de-identified TCGA patient mutation cases (open-access data, cBioPortal)
pipeline: 4-tier: direct FDA match → FDA-approved repurposing → investigational repurposing → custom design

tier_definitions.DIRECT_FDA: Exact or evidence-matched FDA-approved therapy for the variant/context.
tier_definitions.FDA_REPURPOSING: FDA-approved drug for the target/gene but not a direct label match; requires off-label oncology review.
tier_definitions.INVESTIGATIONAL_REPURPOSING: Mechanistically supported non-approved candidate or clinical-stage agent; trial or expanded-access path needed.
tier_definitions.CUSTOM_DESIGN: No suitable known therapy found; medicinal chemistry brief generated for preclinical follow-up.

patients.patient_next_step: Ask your oncologist whether the ranked off-label FDA-approved therapy can be justified for EGFR in Bladder Urothelial Carcinoma, using tumor-board review, compendium support, and prior-authorization documentation.
